topics.description: Topics this client wants pushed. Empty ⇒ no-op; the daemon must still reply OK so the client can confirm the round-trip.

EventTopic.description: Topic vocabulary for [`EventsSubscribe`]. Each variant maps 1:1 to a notification method name in [`crate::notifications::NOTIFICATION_NAMES`]. Adding a topic here is a wire-compat change; the dispatcher MUST reject unknown ones at decode time so older daemons fail loudly rather than silently dropping a subscription.

oneOf.description: State transitions for any visible session (`session.state`).
Backpressure / drop notice for a session ring buffer (`session.gap`).
Daemon health pulse for the status bar (`daemon.health`).

Scheduler-loop pulse for the status bar (`scheduler.health`). M4.4 (WEK-74). Distinct from [`Self::DaemonHealth`] — adapter probes vs scheduler queue/run metrics — so clients can opt into either surface independently.

Per-worktree mutation notice (`worktree.changed`). Pushed after `worktree.stage` / `worktree.unstage` / `worktree.discard` / `worktree.commit` succeeds, so other clients attached to the same session can invalidate cached diff state. M2.5 (WEK-28).
New commit landed on a session's worktree branch (`worktree.commit_created`). Carries `commit_sha` so the TUI can pop a toast. M2.5 (WEK-28).
